semantic.role: Live benchmark runner for ArchSpine's AST-based semantic extraction pipeline
responsibilities: Define and execute benchmark scenarios for AST extraction and LLM-based summarization/validation
Provide sample configurations covering small files, large files, multi-import, rule-dense, and drift-prone scenarios
Integrate with OpenAI-compatible LLM providers for semantic analysis
Log benchmark results and generate summary reports
outOfScope: Production deployment or runtime execution of the ArchSpine system
Detailed algorithm descriptions for AST extraction internals

English.purpose: This document implements a live benchmark runner that tests ArchSpine's ability to extract AST-based semantic information and perform LLM-driven summarization and validation across diverse code scenarios.
English.context_and_audience: Intended for developers and maintainers of the ArchSpine system who need to validate the accuracy and robustness of the semantic extraction pipeline. The benchmark covers edge cases like small files, large files, multi-import modules, rule-dense validation, and drift-prone scenarios.
key_takeaways: Benchmark covers 7 distinct scenarios with varying complexity and task modes (summarize vs validate)
Integrates with OpenAI-compatible LLM providers for semantic analysis
Includes dependency context and rule data to test constraint-aware validation
Logs results to externaldocs/logs/ for analysis and regression tracking

Simplified Chinese.purpose: 本文档实现了一个实时基准测试运行器，用于测试 ArchSpine 系统基于 AST 的语义提取能力，以及通过 LLM 驱动的摘要生成和验证功能，覆盖多种代码场景。
Simplified Chinese.context_and_audience: 面向 ArchSpine 系统的开发者和维护者，用于验证语义提取管道的准确性和鲁棒性。基准测试覆盖小文件、大文件、多导入模块、规则密集型验证以及易漂移场景等边界情况。
key_takeaways: 基准测试覆盖 7 个不同场景，包含摘要和验证两种任务模式
集成 OpenAI 兼容的 LLM 提供商进行语义分析
包含依赖上下文和规则数据，用于测试约束感知的验证能力
结果记录到 externaldocs/logs/ 目录，便于分析和回归跟踪
